conjectures.title: CSP presence-only is insufficient
conjectures.hypothesis: A CSP of 'default-src *' or 'unsafe-inline unsafe-eval' provides zero XSS protection yet passes current check. Parsing policy directives will catch >80% of weak CSPs against haxgoat.
evidence: haxgoat /weak-csp: default-src * unsafe-inline unsafe-eval now correctly FAILs

conjectures.title: HSTS max-age=0 is a security regression
conjectures.hypothesis: max-age=0 disables HSTS per RFC 6797. Parsing the numeric value and failing on <31536000 will catch all HSTS downgrade misconfigurations.
evidence: haxgoat /hsts-zero: max-age=0 now correctly FAILs with RFC 6797 citation

conjectures.title: CORS origin reflection is more dangerous than wildcard
conjectures.hypothesis: Sending Origin: evil.example.com and checking if reflected in ACAO will detect the most critical CORS misconfiguration that wildcard-only check misses.

conjectures.title: Idempotency requires state comparison not status codes
conjectures.hypothesis: RFC 9110 defines idempotency as same server-side effect, not same response. A GET-after-PUT comparison will have fewer false positives than status code comparison.

conjectures.title: Relevance matrix eliminates nonsense mutation-predicate pairs
conjectures.hypothesis: Routing mutations to semantically relevant predicate groups via a static matrix will reduce test count by >60% while maintaining full coverage.

conjectures.title: Multi-request predicate signature enables 11 stub predicates
conjectures.hypothesis: Adding MultiPredicate func(client, target) Result to NamedPred unblocks idempotency, safety, csrf, 304, replay, toctou, workflow-skip, retries, cors-reflection, jsonp, rate-limit without changing existing single-response predicates.

conjectures.title: SameSite=None without Secure is a browser-rejected cookie
conjectures.hypothesis: Parsing SameSite attribute value and checking for Secure flag co-presence will catch the silent cookie rejection that current substring check misses.
evidence: haxgoat /samesite-none-insecure: SameSite=None without Secure now correctly FAILs

conjectures.title: Mutation Apply violates immutability of input request
conjectures.hypothesis: Deep-copying Headers map in each mutator will prevent Apply from modifying the original request, provable by test: original.Headers unchanged after Apply.

conjectures.title: Request type in generator creates semantic confusion and cycle risk
conjectures.hypothesis: Extracting Request to internal/request/ will eliminate all generator imports that exist solely for the type (mutation, executor), reduce import edges by 2, and prevent future cycles.

conjectures.title: Predicate split reduces blast radius without API changes
conjectures.hypothesis: Splitting predicate.go into 7 files (types, runner, headers, methods, crossorigin, cache, state) within the same package will pass all existing tests with zero import or API changes.

conjectures.title: cmdList hardcoded data diverges from predicate package
conjectures.hypothesis: Replacing cmdList string literals with predicate.AllGroups() iteration will show cors-reflection and referrer-policy that are currently hidden from hax list output.
